name: State Readout and Projective Readout Types
description: Definition of state readout, projective readout, and properly aligned projective readout functions.

elements.text: The system Z has state readout iff OSZ(B) = SZ and PJNB ∘ ID(SZ) for every output port B (i.e., output is the state).
The readout RZ is projective iff for every i, there exists j such that RiZ = PJN(SZ, SjZ).
The projective readout RZ is properly aligned iff for every i, RiZ = PJN(SZ, SiZ).
